name: Guardian Spirit

abilities.name: Foot on the Path
abilities.text: After attaching a friendly upgrade, this model may place itself within 3" of its current location.

actions.name: Ancestral Blessing
actions.effects: Allies within (m)2" of the target gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: "A Curse on the Bones of Your Ancestors!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared while in the enemy deployment zone.
actions.effects: Select any scheme. The next time the opponent chooses a Next Available Scheme, they must choose it from the section on the scheme you chose.

extraction_notes: Ancestral Blessing uses (m) for magic range icon in the 2" distance measurement
Both actions have signature icons indicated by the special icon markers in the original
